markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 141-A — Sanitation patrol vehicle

Every vehicle operated by an officer or member of the sanitation police of the department of sanitation of the city of New York, duly appointed and designated as a peace officer by such department, when such officer or member is acting pursuant to his special duties.

*Last modified: Nov. 4, 2016*
